parameters.jsCode:
// Auto-converted from Set v3 (n8n 2.15.x SetV2 node crashes at SetV2.node.ts:352)
return [{ json: {
  "projectId": $json.projectId,
  "runId": $json.runId,
  "scope": $json.scope,
  "overallRisk": $json.overallRisk,
  "findings": JSON.stringify($json.findings),
  "summary": JSON.stringify($json.summary),
  "architecture": JSON.stringify($json.architecture),
  "completedAt": $now.toISO(),
  "criticalCount": $json.summary.criticalCount,
  "totalFindings": $json.summary.totalFindings,
  "hasCritical": $json.hasCritical
} }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'security-scanner', projectId: $json.projectId, runId: $json.runId, result: { findings: JSON.parse($json.findings || '[]'), summary: JSON.parse($json.summary || '{}'), overallRisk: $json.overallRisk, scope: $json.scope }, completedAt: $json.completedAt }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'security-scanner', projectId: $('Compile Report').first().json.projectId, severity: 'critical', message: 'Security scan found ' + $('Compile Report').first().json.criticalCount + ' critical findings in project ' + $('Compile Report').first().json.projectId, overallRisk: $('Compile Report').first().json.overallRisk, findings: JSON.parse($('Compile Report').first().json.findings || '[]').filter(f => f.severity === 'critical'), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, workflow: 'security-scanner', findings: JSON.parse($('Compile Report').first().json.findings || '[]'), overallRisk: $('Compile Report').first().json.overallRisk, summary: JSON.parse($('Compile Report').first().json.summary || '{}'), completedAt: $('Compile Report').first().json.completedAt }) }}
